title: Graf Bobby, der Schrecken des wilden Westens
original_title: Graf Bobby, der Schrecken des Wilden Westens
overview: An Austrian earl learns that he has inherited land in Arizona, in the American wild west. The count and his friend journey to America to claim the inheritance. There, they encounter danger, desperados, and the none-too-friendly daughter of the local sheriff.
